name: aether-theme-src
description: Aether Hugo theme source files for philohao.com, adapted from DoIt.

scripts.babel: npx babel src/js/theme.js --out-file assets/js/theme.min.js --source-maps --no-comments && npx babel src/js/sw.js --out-file assets/sw.min.js --source-maps --no-comments

author: Jianfeng.Hao <haojianfeng1997@gmail.com> (https://philohao.com/)
